summary.summary: Refactors Fastfile capability logic: instead of creating missing capabilities via create_capability, the Fastfile now computes missing capabilities and calls bundle_id.update_capability(cap, enabled: true). After updating, it re-fetches capabilities and raises UI.user_error! listing any still-missing capabilities. (See diff:bdfdb7928291 and commit:2cbba7db7fd7; file:9b56f0a79bfc.)
summary.userFacingImpact: This changes fastlane behavior when configuring bundle IDs: runs will update capabilities rather than create them, and the lane will abort with an error if any requested capabilities remain missing after the update. This may cause fastlane executions that previously succeeded (when create_capability was used) to fail now if updates do not produce the expected capabilities. Recommend human review of CI/automation that relies on this Fastfile change. (See diff:bdfdb7928291 and commit:2cbba7db7fd7.)
